form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 1.5 lengths second over 600m The Meadows in 34.75. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 1.5 lengths second over 600m The Meadows in 34.75. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th over 460m at Warragul beaten 8 lengths (26.31) behind I'm Fabulous in a Grade 4/5 on February 24. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 6th over 460m at Warragul beaten 8 lengths (26.31) behind I'm Fabulous in a Grade 4/5 on February 24. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has been consistent, placing at his last 4 starts. Latest effort finished 3rd over 485m at Horsham beaten 4 lengths (27.42) behind Doongalla Rocket in a Grade 4/5 on March 31. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been consistent, placing at his last 4 starts. Latest effort finished 3rd over 485m at Horsham beaten 4 lengths (27.42) behind Doongalla Rocket in a Grade 4/5 on March 31. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (34.78) in a Grade 5, finishing a nose second. Yet to win but has placed five times from this draw. Suited here and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at this track (34.78) in a Grade 5, finishing a nose second. Yet to win but has placed five times from this draw. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Meadows over 600m. Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Meadows over 600m. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.5 lengths in 34.63, beating Moraine Dylan. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on April 6 over 595m at this track behind Moraine Dylan beaten 6 lengths (34.97). Is a danger.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.5 lengths in 34.63, beating Moraine Dylan. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on April 6 over 595m at this track behind Moraine Dylan beaten 6 lengths (34.97). Is a danger.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by a neck at this track (30.07) beating Paw Zenith in a Grade 5 on March 30. Needs to find a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by a neck at this track (30.07) beating Paw Zenith in a Grade 5 on March 30. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 525m at The Meadows. Hard to entertain this time.
